name: EasyDesktop
short_description: This is a desktop file organizing, sorting software It can display desktop files in categories (applications, pictures, audio and video, compressed, other) You can also map frequently used folders to your desktop, where you can quickly access them His file sorting is animated at a glance
detailed_description:
This is a desktop file organizing, sorting software
It can display desktop files in categories (applications, pictures, audio and video, compressed, other)
You can also map frequently used folders to your desktop, where you can quickly access them
His file sorting is animated at a glance
He hides the little shortcut arrow icon for desktop ICONS
It is compatible with win7, win10, win11
about_the_game:
